hero.subtitle: Family-owned and rooted in the heart of Cuban-American pride. We treat every home like our own — with care, passion, and the kind of clean your abuela would approve of.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: Born in Havana, Built in Miami.
about.p1: Havana Cleaning was founded by two sisters who brought their Cuban heritage — and their grandmother's relentless standards for cleanliness — to every home they touch.
about.p2: We're not just a cleaning company. We're a family business with deep roots, and we bring that warmth and dedication into every space we clean.
about.p3: From Kendall to Coral Gables, from Brickell condos to Hialeah family homes — we bring the same Cuban pride to every address.

pricing.label: Transparent Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, Honest Rates
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprises. Priced by your home size — choose the plan that fits.

booking.label: Reserve Your Clean
booking.title: Book Online. Pay Securely.
booking.subtitle: Fill out the form, choose your service, and we'll confirm your appointment within the hour.

areas.label: Where We Clean
areas.title: Serving All of Miami-Dade
areas.subtitle: Click an area to see local pricing and availability.

careers.label: Join the Family
careers.title: We're Hiring Cleaners
careers.subtitle: Join a team that values hard work, respect, and Cuban pride. No paperwork — apply 100% online.

footer.tagline: Family-owned cleaning service rooted in Cuban-American pride. Serving all of Miami-Dade County.
footer.madeWith: Made with love by the family, for your family.
